From:
chartering@varitasnavigation.com <chartering@varitasnavigation.com>
Sent:
14 January 2026 18:10
To:
chartering@glimpes.com
Cc:
\'Varitas Navigation\' <chartering@varitasnavigation.com>
Subject:
FIRM OFFER
DEAR SUNIL
GOOD DAY,
FIRM OFFER. OWNERS TO REVERT IN 30 MINS.
ALL NEGOTIATIONS AND FIXTURE DETAILS TO BE KEPT STRICTLY PNC.
PERFORMING VSL\'S PARTICULAR AS FOLLOW: PLEASE INSERT
VESSEL SHOULD BE GEARED
VSL\'S ITINERARY AS FOLLOW:
PERFORMING OWNERS :
HEAD OWNER:
DISPONENT OWNER:
BANKING DETAILS:
OWNERS BANKING DETAILS INCLUDING DETAILS OF INTERMEDIARY BANK
A)   OWRS GUARANTEE THAT VSL IS CLASSED TO LLOYDS 100 A1 OR EQUIVALENT AND WILL REMAIN SO FOR THE DURATION OF THIS VOYAGE.
B)   OWRS GUARANTEE THAT VSL IS ENTERED WITH AND INSURED ‘FOR ALL CARGO RISK ‘UNLESS ITS UNDISPUTED OWNERS FAULT AND NEGLIANCE‘’ WITH A INTERNATIONAL GROUP PNI CLUB AND WILL REMAIN SO FOR THE DURATION OF THIS VOYAGE ‘AND THAT ALL CALLS, INCLUDE SUPPLEMENTARY CALLS ARE FULLY PAID UP.
C)  OWRS GUARANTEE THAT VSL IS FULLY H+M INSURED AND WILL REMAIN SO FOR THE DURATION OF THIS VOYAGE.
D)   OWRS GUARANTEE THAT ALL VSLS CERTIFICATES ARE VALID AND FULLY UP TO DATE AND OWRS ACCEPT TO MAKE SAME AVAILABLE TO CHRTRS FOR INSPECTION, IF REQUESTED. VESSEL ISM CERTIFIED. BIMCO ISM CLAUSE TO APPLY
E)   OWRS GUARANTEE THAT VSL\'S HOLDS ARE FREE OF ANY OBSTRUCTIONS/BULKHEADS/STANCHIONS, AND THAT VSL IS IN EVERY WAY SUITABLE TO SHIP/LOAD/DISCH THE INTENDED CARGO.
F)  OWNERS GUARANTEE VESSEL IS TOTALLY SUITABLE TO CARRY THE INTENDED METCOKE / LAMCOKE WITH SLACK HATCHES AND WITHOUT ANY BAGGING / STRAPPING / SECURING. CARGO TO BE LOADED IN BIGBAGS, IF ANY LASHING/SECURING/DUNNAGE/UNLASHING NEEDED TO BE CHTRS ACCT.
G)  VESSEL TO BE SUITABLE TO TRADE IN ALL RESPECTS TO ALL PORTS UNDER THIS CONTRACT OF CARRIAGE OF COAL SEMI COKE (BAGGED CARGO)
H)  VSL SUITABLE FOR SHORE CRANE LOADING / DISCHARGING
I)     VSL SHOULD COMPLY WITH LOAD AND DISCHARGE PORT RULES AND REGULATIONS AND NOT BLACKLISTED AT LOAD AND DISCHARGE PORT.
J)  OWNERS TO NOMINATE VESSEL AS PER LOAD / DISCHARGE PORT RULES AND REGULATIONS REGARDING VESSEL NOMINATIONS AND LAYDAY PERIODS.
OWNERS TO PROVIDE:
AA) VESSEL SPECS AS PER SHORT DESCRIPTION
BB) VESSEL\'S ITINERARY: AS PER ABOVE
CC) CP CHAIN:   PLS ADVISE IF ANY AS PER ABOVE
PERFORMING OWNERS – AS PER ABOVE
DD) VESSEL\'S LAST 3 CARGOES / LAST 3 PORTS & TRADE VSLS ARE NEW BUILDING VESSELS AND THEIR MAIDEN VOYAGES
EE) P&I CLUB OF HEAD OWS & DISPONENT OWNERS AS PER ABOVE
FF) VESSEL\'S LOADABALITY: AS PER STOW PLAN PROVIDED – TO BE PROVIDED
GG) VESSEL CERTIFICATES – FOR BEYZA ATTACHED, FOR SENA TO BE PROVIDED ON DELIVERY OF THE VSL FROM SHIPYARD
HH) HOLD WISE STOWAGE PLAN TO BE PROVIDED
++
CHARTERERS:
VARITAS NAVIGATION PRIVATE LIMITED.
OFFICE N0. 34, DFACTORY, SWAMINARAYAN BLDG, VASAI WEST MUMBAI 401 202.
1. CARGO: M
IN 8,000 MT METCOKE IN APPROX 1 TONNE JUMBO BAGS S.F. 2.0 WOG (DIMENSION OF ABT 0,95MX0,95MX1,45M – 1,05/1,10 MT PER BAG WOG)
MIN QNTY 8800 MT - ANY EXTRA QNTY MORE THAN 8800 MT 50 % FREIGHT TO APPLY
CHTRS TO DECLARE CARGO QUANTITIES FOR BOTH VESSELS LATEST 1 DAYS BEFORE ARRIVAL VSLS TO LOAD PORT
CHARTERERS CONFIRM CARGO IS LAWFUL, HARMLESS AND NON DANGEROUS. OWNER TO PROVIDE STOWAGE PLAN WELL BEFORE ARRIVAL AT LOAD PORT. CARGO TO BE LOADED DISCHARGED, STOWED AND TRANSPORTED IN ACCORDANCE WITH LATEST IMO IMSBC CODES, RULES AND REGULATIONS.
OWNER CONFIRM CARGO TO BE LOADED UNDER GROUP "A" OR “C” CATEGORY IN CASE OF GROUP "A" SHIPPER TO PRESENT TML CERTIFICATE AND ACTUAL MOISTURE CONTENT TEST REPORT PRIOR COMMENCEMENT OF LOADING.
2. LAYCAN: 21
ST
JANUARY -25
TH
JANUARY 2026.
IN CASE VESSEL ARRIVES BEFORE THE AGREED LAYCAN, THE CHARTERERS HAS RIGHT TO MAKE HER WAIT TILL THE FIRST DAY OF AGREED LAYCAN OR TO COMMENCE LOADING UPON ARRIVAL 12 HRS TT EIU BENDS.
3. LOAD PORT:
1SP 1 SB RIZHAO , CHINA
4. DISCHARGING PORT:
1 SP 1/2 SOHAR, OMAN.
SECOND SHIFTING FM BERTH TO BERTH CHTRS ACCT IF REQUESTED BY CHARTERERS AS PER BELOW CLS 13.
NO SHIP TO SHIP A/O DISCH AT ANCHORAGE IS ALLOWED.
5. LOAD RATE:
4000 MT PWWD SSHINC
6. DISCHARGE RATE:
3500 MT PWWD SSHINC
7. FREIGHT:
USD 38.00 PMT FIOST BSS 1/1
AB)) 12HRS TT AT LOADPORT AND EACH DISCHARGE PORTS EIU.
FOR ANY ADDITIONAL QTY OVER AND ABOVE AGREED QUANTITY, OWNER TO CONSIDER 50%. LAYTIME TO COUNT BASIS THE QTY FOR WHICH FREIGHT AND DEADFREIGHT IS PAID. SERVICE TAX ON FREIGHT AS PER INDIAN GOVT. NORMS, IF APPLICABLE, IS TO BE ON CHRTS / RECEIVERS ACCOUNT ONLY.
8. VESSEL TO BE SDBC, MAX 20 YEARS FULLY P&I COVERED AND CLASSED LLOYDS 100 A1 OR EQUIVALENT. VESSEL NOT TO HAVE FLAG OF A COUNTRY PROHIBITED FOR TRADING IN INDIA OR CHINA. VESSEL IS GEARLESS
9. NOMINATED VESSEL SHOULD NOT BE BLACKLISTED BY ANY TERMINAL OR ANCHORAGES IN LOAD/DISPORTS AND NEITHER THE VESSEL NOR ANY PARTY INVOLVED DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY IN THE OWNERSHIP, MANAGEMENT OF OPERATION OF THE VESSEL TO BE SUBJECT TO ANY SANCTION OF THE UN, US, EU OFAC OR ANY OTHER COUNTRY OR SIMILAR ENTITY OR TO HAVE LINKS TO SUCH COUNTRIES. VESSEL FLAG SHOULD NOT BE OF A SANCTIONED COUNTRY SUCH AS BUT NOT LIMITED TO RUSSIA, IRAN, NORTH KOREA, SYRIA.OWNERS TO NOMINATE VESSEL ALONG WITH VESSEL ARE ALL VALID CERTIFICATES, VESSEL\'S ITINERARY AND DETAILS OF LAST 3 CARGOES CARRIED.
FOLLOWING CRITERIA TO FULFILL WHILE NOMINATING A PERFORMING VESSEL : -
====================================================================
A. VESSEL IS SUITABLE FOR CARRYING SEMI COKE IN BAGSLAM COKE NUT COKE SEMI COKE & COKE BREEZE ALWAYS TO BE W/I AGREED LAYCAN
B. OWNERS TO ADVISE VESSEL FULL DESCRIPTION INCLUDING: PREVIOUS, NAME(S), FULL C/P CHAIN, ORIGINAL OWNERS\' FULL STYLE, ALL DISPONENT, OWNERS\' FULL STYLE (IF ANY), PANDI, PER-STOWAGE PLAN, REGISTRY, HATCH + HOLDS FLAT TANK TOP DIMENSIONS, LAST THREE CARGOES, LAST THREE PORTS BEFORE CHARTERER’S LOADING PORT AND VESSEL’S FULL PORT ROTATION UP TO CHARTERER’S DISCHARGING PORT.
OWNERS SHALL FULLY INDEMNIFY AND HOLD HARMLESS CHARTERER AND/OR CARGO RECEIVERS AGAINST ANY AND ALL CLAIMS, DAMAGES, COSTS AND EXPENSES, DEMAND AND ACTIONS ARISING FROM, OR IN CONNECTION WITH, THE ORIGINAL OR DISPONENT(S) OWNERS AND/OR ANY OWNERSHIP IN THE CHAIN OF PERFORMING VESSEL (I) NOT BEING IN SOUND FINANCIAL CONDITIONS AND/OR (II) THE SUBJECT OF ANY INSOLVENCY, RECEIVERSHIP BANKRUPTCY, REHABILITATION, BUSINESS RESCUE OR OTHER EQUIVALENT PROCEEDINGS IN ANY JURISDICTION, AT ANY TIME THROUGHOUT THE DURATION OF THE VOYAGE.
10. LAYTIME OR TIME ON DEMURRAGE TO STOP COUNTING ON COMPLETION OF LOADING/DISCHARGING. HOWEVER IF TIME FOR DOCUMENTATION EXCEEDS 12 HOURS AFTER COMPLETION OF LOADING/FINAL DRAFT SURVEY WHICHEVER IS LATER THEN LAYTIME OR DEMURRAGE TO RESTART AFTER THESE 12 HOURS UNTIL DOCUMENTS HANDOVER TO AGENTS. CHTRS GTEE THAT SHIPPERS HAVE ET LICENSE(EXPORTIT TERDAFTAR)AND IF ANY DELAYS/TIME/COST RELATED TO NON-PROCESSION OF CARGO DOCUMENTS TO BE IN CHTRS ACCOUNT. IN CASE OF ANY DELAYS ON SAILING DUE TO OWNER\'S FAULT/INTENTION NOT TO COUNT AS LAYTIME.
11. OWNERS TO SATISFY THEMSELVES WITH PORT AND DRAFT RESTRICTIONS AND CONFIRM COMPLIANCE BOTH ENDS.
12. INITIAL, FINAL AND ONE INTERMEDIATE DRAFT SURVEY NOT TO COUNT AS LAYTIME BENDS, EVEN IF ON DEMURRAGE. IN CASE OF DRAFT SURVEY CONDUCTED BY MASTER/CHIEF OFFICER AS PER THEIR REQUIREMENT THEN TIME NOT TO COUNT AS LAYTIME. JUMBO BAGS CARGO SHALL BE ALLOWED FOR LOADING UNDER SHORE WEIGHMENT.  OWNERS REPRESENTATIVE TO WITNESS & MONITOR OPERATIONS AND FINALISE NUMBER OF BAGS LOADED/DISCHARGED TO ENSURE NO CARGO SHORTAGE. MASTER/OWNERS TO BE RESPONSIBLE FOR NUMBER OF BAGS/SLING BAGS LOADED. HOWEVER MASTER/OWNERS ARE NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR POSSIBLE WEIGHT SHORTAGE AND SAME TO BE SETTLED DIRECTLY BETWEEN CHRTRS/SHIPPERS/RECEIVERS.
13. TIME SPENT SHIFTING (ANCHOR AWEIGH OR PILOT ON BOARD WHICHEVER IS EARLIER UPTO GANGWAY PLACEMENT)FROM ANY WAITING PLACE TO THE FIRST LOAD OR DISCH BERTH OR ANCHORAGE TO BE FOR OWNERS\' ACCOUNT. SHIFTING TIME NOT TO COUNT AS LAYTIME BENDS, EVEN IF ON DEMURRAGE.FIRST SHIFTING ON OWNERS ACCOUNT ANY SUBSEQUENT SHIFTING ON CHRTS ACCOUNT, IF SO REQUESTED BY CHARTERERS. IF SHIFTING IS REQUESTED BY MASTER, THEN SHIFTING TO BE FOR OWNERS ACCOUNT.
14. OTHER THAN AGREED PORT/ANCHORAGE ABOVE CHARTERERS WILL HAVE OPTION OF LOADING AT ANY OTHER SAFE CHINESE ANCHORAGE AND / OR DISCHARGING AT ANY OTHER EAST COAST INDIA PORTS AND FREIGHT OF SAME TO BE CALCULATED ON OPEN BOOK BASIS, ON USD 4500 TC EQUIVALENT.  DISCHARGE RATES TO BE MUTUALLY AGREED. LOAD RATE TO REMAIN UNCHANGED ONCE DECLARED.
15. NOR AT LOAD PORT TO BE TENDERED ATDNSHINC WWWW
.
NOR AT DISCHARGE PORT TO BE TENDERED ATDNSHINC, WIBON, WICCON, WIFPON
AND WIPON, BUT LAY TIME AT LOAD AND DISCHARGE PORT(S) SHALL COMMENCE TWELVE (12) HOURS AFTER THE VESSEL TENDERS VALID NOR EIU.
ONCE ON DEMURRAGE ALWAYS ON DEMURRAGE TO APPLY.
LAYTIME WILL NOT INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING EVEN IF THE VESSEL IS ALREADY ON DEMURRAGE:
I)   1ST SHIFTING TIME FROM ANCHORAGE TO DISCHARGING BERTH, FIRST BERTH TO BERTH SHIFTING AND ANY OTHER SHIFTING REQUESTED BY THE VESSEL;
II) TIME USED CARRYING OUT DRAFT SURVEYS;
III) TIME USED FOR BUNKERING, OR USED DUE TO BREAKDOWN, INEFFICIENCY OR ANY OTHER CAUSE ATTRIBUTABLE OR RELATING TO THE  VESSEL, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO HER OWNER, OFFICERS OR CREW. WHICH DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY PREVENTS, DELAYS OR INTERFERES WITH LOADING OR DISCHARGING OPERATIONS, SHALL NOT COUNT AS LAYTIME OR, IF ON DEMURRAGE, AS TIME ON DEMURRAGE.
IV)
ANY TIME LOST IN OBTAINING FREE PRATIQUE AND/OR CUSTOMS CLEARANCE AND/OR COMPLETING ADMINISTRATIVE PORT ARRIVAL PROCEDURES; AND LABOR DISPUTE, STRIKE, GO SLOW, WORK TO RULE, LOCK OUT, STOPPAGE OR RESTRAINT OF LABOUR INVOLVING THE OWNER, OFFICERS OR CREW OF THE VESSEL,
V)   AT PORT OF DISCHARGING, LAYTIME SHALL EXCLUDE BUNKERING TIME PROVIDED DISCHARGING OPERATIONS ARE NOT PERFORMED DUE TO BUNKERING (UNLESS USED FOR DISCHARGING). (UNLESS USED FOR LOADING & DISCHARGING).
VI)
FORCE MAJEURE EVENTS AT THE DISCHARGE PORT SHALL STOP THE RUNNING OF LAYTIME.
VII)   ANY DELAY WHICH IS WHOLLY ATTRIBUTABLE TO SHIP, CREW OF SHIP AND/OR SHIP\'S MECHANICAL FAILURE.
VIII)  HOLIDAYS AS PER BIMBO HOLIDAY CALENDER 2025 UU, IUATUTC
IX)  TIME USED FOR CUSTOM CLEARANCE, FIRST OPENING AND LAST CLOSING OF HATCHES, HOLD INSPECTION, WARPING, GANGWAY PLACEMENT
X) DELAYS DUE TO WEATHER CONDITIONS, WHERE DUE TO THE VESSEL FAULT/RISKS, BARGES CANNOT BE ALONGSIDE ALTHOUGH THE CARGO IS AVAILABLE AT THE LOADING ANCHORAGE UNLESS ALREADY ON DEMURRAGE WHEREIN ONCE ON DEMURRAGE ALWAYS ON DEMURRAGE TO APPLY.
16. LAY TIME SHALL COMMENCE LOAD PORT AND AT DISPORT TWELVE (12) HRS AFTER THE VESSEL TENDERS VALID NOR EIU BENDS. IN CASE OF FREE PRATIQUE NOT GRANTED (MORE THAN 1 HRS AFTER EXPIRY OF TURN TIME) DUE TO VESSEL REASON THEN TIME NOT TO COUNT AS LAYTIME. LAYTIME AT DISCHARGE PORT NOT TO COUNT AND NOR WILL NOT BE ACCEPTED DURING BIMCO HOLIDAYS AT DISCHARGE PORT EVEN IF ON DEMURRAGE.
17. CHARTERERS NOMINATED AGENTS AT OWNERS COST BENDS SUB COMPETITIVE DA\'S. PDA AT BENDS TO BE ON OWNERS ACCOUNT.
18. CHARTERERS TO DECLARE FINAL DISCHARGE PORT PRIOR PASSING SINGAPORE.
19. FREIGHT PAYMENT 100 PCT IN USD LESS 2.5%ADD  COMMISION TO OWNERS BANK ACCOUNT WITHIN 3 BANKING DAYS SIGNING/RELEASING CLEAN ON-BOARD B/L AT LOAD PORT ALONGWITH FREIGHT INVOICE. BS/L MARKED "FREIGHT PAYABLE AS PER C/P". MASTER IS ALLOWED TO REJECT ANY UNSOUND CARGO, SAME TO BE IMMEDIATELY REPLACED WITH SOUND CARGO COMPLETELY ON CHARTERERS A/C.
20. DEMURRAGE/DESPATCH ALONGWITH BALANCE FREIGHT TO BE SETTLED WITHIN 30 DAYS OF COMPLETION OF DISCHARGE AND SUBMISSION OF TIME SHEETS, STATEMENT OF FACTS AND NOTICE OF READINESS DULY SIGNED BY ALL CONCERNED PARTIES.
ONCE OWNERS FFI IS PAID BY CHTRS, FILES STANDS FULLY CLOSED AND NO FURTHER PAYMENTS/CLAIMS/INVOICES SHALL BE RAISED BY OWNERS TO CHTRS.
21. DEM / DES: USD 6,500 PDPR. FREE DESPATCH AT BENDS
22. 2.5% ADD COMM ON F/D/D PAYABLE BY THE OWNER.
23. SWITCH B/L:
IN CASE CHARTERERS NEED TO SWITCH BS/L, SAME TO BE ISSUED IN FRONT OF OWNRS PNI REPRESENTATIVE AT PLACE IN OWNRS OPTION IN EXCHANGE FOR 1ST SET BS/L ISSUED AT LOAD PORT BY OWNERS OR THEIR AGENTS.
SWITCHED BS/L WILL BE IDENTICAL WITH 1ST SET BS/L BUT CHARTERERS ARE ALLOWED TO CHANGE THE NAME OF SHIPPER, CONSIGNEE, NOTIFY PARTY, FREIGHT TERM(APPLICABLE ONLY IN CASE OF FREIGHT PREPAID B/L) AND DISCHARGE PORT, PROVIDED THE CHANGED DISCHARGE PORT IS AS PER C/P AGREED. ONLY CONGEN BS/L TO BE USED.
CHARTERERS TO SEND DRAFT COPY OF 2ND SET BS/L FOR OWNERS\' CONFIRMATION WELL IN ADVANCE. UPON OWNERS\' CONFIRMATION, ONE COPY OF NON-NEGOTIABLE B/L WILL BE PROVIDED TO CHARTERERS FOR DOCUMENTATION PURPOSE ONLY WITHIN 5 DAYS OF B/L DATE BUT BEFORE SURRENDER OF 1ST SET. CHARTERERS TO PROVIDE LOI IN OWNERS PNI CLUB FORMAT - WITHOUT INVOLVING BANK GUARANTEE - FOR ALL CONSEQUENCES WHATSOEVER OF CANCELLATION AND REISSUING 1ST SET OF BS/L. SPLITTING BLS IS ACCEPTABLE.
ORIGINAL 2ND SET OF BILLS OF LADING WILL BE RELEASED BY AGENT ONLY AFTER CHARTERER HAS SURRENDERED 1ST SET OF BILLS OF LADING. PREPAID BILLS OF LADING CAN BE ISSUED ONLY AFTER OWNERS HAVE RECEIVED 100 PCT FREIGHT IN THEIR NOMINATED BANK\'S ACCOUNT. CHARTERERS WILL INDEMNIFY OWNERS FOR ALL COSTS AND CONSEQUENCES ARISING OUT OF CHARTERERS SWITCHING BS/L.
SURRENDERING OF 1ST SET ORIGINAL BL STAMPED "NULL & VOID " TO OWNERS AGENTS / PNI REPRESENTATIVE IN LONDON OR SPORE OR MUTUALLY AGREED LOCATION IN CHARTERERS OPTION TO SAVE TIME IN COURIER/TRANSIT OF OBLS. ANY COST OF REPRESENTATIVE FOR AGENTS / P&I TO BE CHTRS ACCT.
OWNERS TO ENDEAVOUR BEST SUBJECT TO HEAD OWNERS APPROVAL FOR ISSUANCE OF A NON-NEGOTIABLE COPY OF SWITCH BL AHEAD OF SURRENDER OF ORIGINALS IN LONDON OR SPORE IN CHOPT OR ANY OTHER AS MUTUALLY AGREED TO SAVE TIME. THIS WOULD BE REQUIRED FOR CUSTOMS CLEARANCE PURPOSES.
24. LOI: IF THE ORIGINAL BS/L ARE NOT AVAILABLE ON VESSEL\'S ARRIVAL AT DISPORT, OWNERS SHALL ALLOW DISCHARGE AND DELIVERY OF CARGO WITHOUT PRESENTATION OF BS/L UPON RECEIPT OF CHARTERERS SINGLE LOI ISSUED IN OWNERS\' PNI CLUB\'S FORMAT SIGNED BY CHTRS AND RECEIVERS AND NOT INVOLVING A BANK GUARANTEE.
25. AS PER BIMCO FORCE MAJEURE 2022
26. HOLD READINESS:
PRIOR TO TENDERING NOR, VSL HOLDS TO BE CLEAN SWEPT, WATER WASHED AND DRIED UP SO AS TO RECEIVE CHARTERERS INTENDED CGO IN ALL RESPECTS FREE OF SALT, RUST SCALE AND PREVIOUS CARGO RESIDUES LIKE SULPHUR, FERTILIZERS ETC TO THE SATISFACTION OF INDEPENDENT SURVEYOR AND IF VSL FAILS TO PASS ANY HOLDS INSPECTION, THEN TIME FROM REJECTION UNTIL ALL VSL\'S HOLDS ARE RE-PASSED FOR LOADING NOT TO COUNT AS LAYTIME. IF LOADING COMMENCE ANY OF THE PASSED HOLD TIME TO COUNT ON PRORATA BASIS
27. OWNERS TO NOMINATE VSL WITH 04 WORKING 3 RUNNING WORKING DAYS ETA NOTICES AND ALWAYS WITHIN THE LAYCAN. IF SUBSTITUTED THEN FINAL PERFORMING VESSEL NOT TO BE EARLIER THAN PREVIOUS ETA AND FINAL PERFORMER MUST GIVE AT LEAST 04 WORKING 3 RUNNING WORKING DAYS FIRM ETA NOTICES. CHARTERERS TO CONFIRM ACCEPTANCE/VSL NOMINATION MAX WITHIN 24 HRS SSHINC. MASTER/OWNERS TO GIVE NOTICES AT LOAD PORT IMMEDIATELY UPON FIXING ALONGWITH TENTATIVE QUANTITY REQUIRED FOR LOADING, FOLLOWED BY 4/3/2/1 DAYS ETA NOTICE. UPON SAILING FROM LOAD PORT, MASTER/OWNERS TO ADVISE ETA DISPORT, FOLLOWED BY 7/5/3/2/1 DAYS ETA NOTICE TO DISCHARGING PORT AGENTS.
ADDITIONAL CLAUSE:
1.       ONLY ONE SUBSTITUTION IS ALLOWED UNDER THIS CP.
2.       SUBSTITUTED VSL TO BE OF SIMILAR INTAKE/SIZE.
3.       SUBSTITUTED VSL SHOULD NOT HAVE ETA EARLIER THAN INITIAL NOMINATED VSL.
4.     3 DAYS BEFORE ARRIVAL, THE MASTER OF VESSEL SHALL COMPLY WITH LOADPORT REQUIREMENT AND TENTATIVE STOWAGE PLAN AFTER CHTRS PROVIDED EXACT BB DIMENSIONS
28. GA/ARB IN LONDON , ENGLISH LAW TO APPLY
29. ALL TAXES & LEVIES (EXCEPT INDIAN SERVICE TAX) ON VSL TO BE ON OWNRS ACCT. ALL TAXES & LEVIES ON CARGO TO BE FOR CHRRS ACCT
30. STEVEDORE DAMAGE CLAUSE:
READ AS : ANY DAMAGE DONE BY STEVEDORES DURING THE CURRENCY OF THE CHARTER PARTY AT LOADING PORT AND DISCHARGING PORTS SHALL BE NOTIFIED BY THE MASTER TO STEVEDORES AT THE TIME OF OCCURRENCE AND ALSO TO OWNERS\' AGENTS AND THE CHARTERERS OR THEIR AGENT IN WRITING LATEST WITHIN 24 HOURS OF SUCH OCCURRENCE OR AS SOON AS POSSIBLE THEREAFTER BUT NOT AFTER THE VESSEL HAS SAILED FROM THE LOADING PORT/DISCHARGING PORTS AS APPLICABLE. MASTER SHALL ENDEAVOUR TO OBTAIN WRITTEN ACCEPTANCE FROM THE STEVEDORES GIVING THE DETAILS OF THE DAMAGE WHICH ARE NOT SETTLED IMMEDIATELY AFTER OCCURRENCE. MASTER WILL ENDEAVOUR TO OBTAIN A WRITTEN ACKNOWLEDGEMENT IN WRITING BY THE SHIPPERS/RECEIVERS AND CHARTERERS\' REPRESENTATIVE AT THE LOADING PORT OR AT THE DISCHARGING PORT AS THE CASE MAY BE. STEVEDORES\' DAMAGE TO BE SETTLED DIRECTLY BETWEEN OWNERS AND STEVEDORES, HOWEVER CHARTERERS SHALL ASSIST OWNERS IN OBTAINING SETTLEMENT FROM STEVEDORES AT THE LOADING AND DISCHARGING PORTS OR ALTERNATIVELY SHALL ASSIST OWNERS IN HAVING STEVEDORES REPAIR STEVEDORES\' DAMAGES INCURRED. NOTWITHSTANDING ANYTHING ELSEWHERE CONTAINED IN THIS CP -
OWNERS CONFIRM THAT CHTRS ARE NOT LIABLE FOR ANY SORT OF COSTS / CLAIMS ETC FOR STEVEDORE DAMAGE(S) OR ITS RELATED COST.
( COMMENT : LOADING AND DISCHARGING WILL BE HANDLED BY CHARTERERS AS SHE IS GEARLESS , ALL LOADING AND DISCHARGING OPERATION WILL BE BEYOND OWNERS CONTROL SO THAT ITS CHARTERERS RESPONSIBILITY )
31. NOTWITHSTANDING ANY OTHER PROVISION IN THIS CHARTER PARTY, IN THE EVENT THAT OWNERS HAVE IN GOOD FAITH NOMINATED A VESSEL WHICH, DUE TO REASONS BEYOND OWNERS’ REASONABLE CONTROL,  FAILS TO ARRIVE WITHIN THE LAYCAN OR TENDER VALID NOTICE OF READINESS, CHARTERERS SHALL FIRST OFFER A REASONABLE EXTENSION OF THE LAYCAN PRIOR TO EXERCISING ANY CANCELLATION RIGHT. ANY CANCELLATION SHALL ONLY BE EFFECTIVE IF PROVIDED BY CHARTERERS IN WRITING AFTER THE EXPIRY OF THE LAYCAN PERIOD. OWNERS SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT OR CONSEQUENTIAL LOSSES ARISING OUT OF THE DELAY, PROVIDED THAT OWNERS SHALL ACT WITH DUE DISPATCH TO MINIMIZE ANY RESULTING DELAY.
32. CHARTERERS CONFIRM NEITHER THEY NOR SHIPPER/RECEIVER ARE SUBJECT TO ANY SANCTION OF THE UN, US, EU OFAC OR ANY OTHER COUNTRY OR SIMILAR ENTITY. CHARTERERS HAVE THE RIGHT TO REJECT A VESSEL IF A PORT OF IRAN WAS ONE OF THE LAST 10 PORTS OF CALL PRIOR TO LOADING OFCARGO.
33. OWNER CONFIRM THAT NO PREVIOUS DISPUTE / CLAIMS WHATSOEVER OUT OF EARLIER FIXTURE BETWEEN VSL AND CHTR NOT TO EFFECT IN THIS SHIPMENT.
34. VESSEL IS FREE OF ENCUMBRANCES AND MARITIME LIENS.
LIEN / ARREST.
———————————————————
=>     OWNERS TO CONFIRM THAT PERFORMING VESSEL NOMINATED UNDER THIS CONTRACT IS FREE FROM ANY OBLIGATION, ENCUMBRANCE, CLAIM OR LIEN, OF A FINANCIAL NATURE OR OTHERWISE, THAT WOULD INTERFERE IN ANY WAY WITH THE VESSELS PERFORMANCE OF THIS VOYAGE AND / OR THE DELIVERY OF THE CARGO WITH THE UTMOST DESPATCH.
=>     IN THE EVENT THE VESSEL OR CARGO IS  LIEN(ED) OR ARRESTED DURING THE CURRENCY OF THIS CHARTER PARTY (OR AFTER COMPLETION OF DISCHARGE IN RESPECT OF THE CARGO) THE OWNERS ARE TO      TAKE IMMEDIATE ACTION TO RELEASE VESSEL/CARGO FROM ANY SUCH LIEN OR ARREST AND TO REMAIN FULLY RESPONSIBLE FOR THE COST OR DAMAGES AS A RESULT OF ANY LIEN OR ARREST OR         INTERRUPTION OF THE VESSELS PERFORMANCE UNDER THIS CHARTER PARTY. FOR THE AVOIDANCE OF DOUBT, IF THE VESSEL OR CARGO IS LIEN(ED) OR ARRESTED DURING THE CURRENCY OF THE CHARTER         PARTY WHILST THE VESSEL IS IN LAYTIME OR ON DEMURRAGE THEN LAYTIME SHALL NOT COUNT AND DEMURRAGE SHALL NOT RUN (IF ON DEMURRAGE).
BIMCO DESIGNATED ENTITIES CLAUSE
———————————————————
(A) THE PROVISIONS OF THIS CLAUSE SHALL APPLY IN RELATION TO ANY SANCTION, PROHIBITION OR RESTRICTION IMPOSED ON ANY SPECIFIED PERSONS, ENTITIES OR BODIES INCLUDING THE DESIGNATION OF SPECIFIED VESSELS OR FLEETS UNDER UNITED NATIONS RESOLUTIONS OR TRADE OR ECONOMIC SANCTIONS, LAWS OR REGULATIONS OF THE EUROPEAN UNION OR THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA.
(B) OWNERS AND CHARTERERS RESPECTIVELY WARRANT FOR THEMSELVES (AND IN THE CASE OF ANY SUBLET, CHARTERERS FURTHER WARRANT IN RESPECT OF ANY SUB-CHARTERERS, SHIPPERS, RECEIVERS, OR CARGO INTERESTS) THAT AT THE DATE OF THIS FIXTURE AND THROUGHOUT THE DURATION OF THIS CP THEY ARE NOT SUBJECT TO ANY OF THE SANCTIONS, PROHIBITIONS, RESTRICTIONS OR DESIGNATION REFERRED TO IN SUB-CLAUSE (A) WHICH PROHIBIT OR RENDER UNLAWFUL ANY PERFORMANCE UNDER THIS CP OR ANY SUBLET OR ANY BILLS OF LADING. OWNERS FURTHER WARRANT THAT THE NOMINATED VESSELS, OR ANY SUBSTITUTE, WILL NOT BE A DESIGNATED VESSEL.
(C)  IF AT ANY TIME DURING THE PERFORMANCE OF THIS CP EITHER PARTY BECOMES AWARE THAT THE OTHER PARTY IS IN BREACH OF WARRANTY AS AFORESAID, THE PARTY NOT IN BREACH SHALL COMPLY WITH THE LAWS AND REGULATIONS OF ANY GOVERNMENT TO WHICH THAT PARTY OR THE VESSEL IS SUBJECT, AND FOLLOW ANY ORDERS OR DIRECTIONS WHICH MAY BE GIVEN BY ANYBODY ACTING WITH POWERS TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE, INCLUDING WHERE APPLICABLE THE OWNERS’ FLAG STATE. IN THE ABSENCE OF ANY SUCH ORDERS, DIRECTIONS, LAWS OR REGULATIONS, THE PARTY NOT IN BREACH MAY, IN ITS OPTION, TERMINATE THE COA FORTHWITH OR, IF CARGO IS ON BOARD, DIRECT THE VESSEL TO ANY SAFE PORT OF THAT PARTY’S CHOICE AND THERE DISCHARGE THE CARGO OR PART THEREOF.
(D) IF, IN COMPLIANCE WITH THE PROVISIONS OF THIS CLAUSE, ANYTHING IS DONE OR IS NOT DONE, SUCH SHALL NOT BE DEEMED A DEVIATION BUT SHALL BE CONSIDERED DUE FULFILMENT OF THIS CP.
(E) NOTWITHSTANDING ANYTHING IN THIS CLAUSE TO THE CONTRARY, OWNERS OR CHARTERERS SHALL NOT BE REQUIRED TO DO ANYTHING WHICH CONSTITUTES A VIOLATION OF THE LAWS AND REGULATIONS OF ANY STATE TO WHICH EITHER OF THEM IS SUBJECT.
(F) OWNERS OR CHARTERERS SHALL BE LIABLE TO INDEMNIFY THE OTHER PARTY AGAINST ANY AND ALL CLAIMS, LOSSES, DAMAGE, COSTS AND FINES WHATSOEVER SUFFERED BY THE OTHER PARTY RESULTING FROM ANY BREACH OF WARRANTY AS AFORESAID.
(G) CHARTERERS SHALL PROCURE THAT THIS CLAUSE IS INCORPORATED INTO ALL SUB-CHARTERS, CONTRACTS OF CARRIAGE AND BILLS OF LADING ISSUED PURSUANT TO THIS CP.
36.
BIMCO SANCTIONS CLAUSE FOR VOYAGE CHARTER PARTIES 2020
(A) FOR THE PURPOSES OF THIS CLAUSE:
“SANCTIONED ACTIVITY” MEANS ANY ACTIVITY, SERVICE, CARRIAGE, TRADE OR VOYAGE SUBJECT TO SANCTIONS IMPOSED BY A SANCTIONING AUTHORITY.
“SANCTIONING AUTHORITY” MEANS THE UNITED NATIONS, EUROPEAN UNION, UNITED KINGDOM, UNITED STATES OF AMERICA OR ANY OTHER APPLICABLE COMPETENT AUTHORITY OR GOVERNMENT.
“SANCTIONED PARTY” MEANS ANY PERSONS, ENTITIES, BODIES, OR VESSELS DESIGNATED BY A SANCTIONING AUTHORITY.
(B) OWNERS WARRANT THAT AT THE DATE OF THIS CHARTER PARTY AND THROUGHOUT ITS DURATION THEY, THE REGISTERED OWNERS, BAREBOAT CHARTERERS, INTERMEDIATE DISPONENT OWNERS, MANAGERS, THE VESSEL AND ANY SUBSTITUTE ARE NOT A SANCTIONED PARTY.
(C) CHARTERERS WARRANT THAT AT THE DATE OF THIS CHARTER PARTY AND THROUGHOUT ITS DURATION THEY AND ANY SUB-CHARTERERS, SHIPPERS, RECEIVERS AND CARGO INTERESTS ARE NOT A SANCTIONED PARTY.
(D) IF AT ANY TIME EITHER PARTY IS IN BREACH OF SUB CLAUSE (B) OR (C) ABOVE THEN THE PARTY NOT IN BREACH MAY TERMINATE AND/OR CLAIM DAMAGES RESULTING FROM THE BREACH.
(E) IF PERFORMANCE OF THIS CHARTER PARTY INVOLVES A SANCTIONED PARTY OR A SANCTIONED ACTIVITY, WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY OTHER RIGHTS THAT MAY BE AVAILABLE IN SUB CLAUSE (D) ABOVE:
(I) IF LOADING HAS NOT COMMENCED, OWNERS MAY CANCEL THIS CHARTER PARTY; OR
(II) IF THE VOYAGE OR THE LOADING HAS COMMENCED, OWNERS MAY REFUSE TO PROCEED AND DISCHARGE ANY CARGO ALREADY LOADED AT ANY SAFE PORT OR PLACE OF THEIR CHOICE (INCLUDING THE PORT OR PLACE OF LOADING) IN COMPLETE FULFILMENT OF THIS CHARTER PARTY,
PROVIDED ALWAYS THAT IF THIS CHARTER PARTY PROVIDES THAT LOADING AND/OR DISCHARGING IS TO TAKE PLACE WITHIN A RANGE OF PORTS OR PLACES THAT DO NOT INVOLVE A SANCTIONED PARTY OR A SANCTIONED ACTIVITY, OWNERS MUST FIRST REQUEST CHARTERERS TO NOMINATE AN ALTERNATIVE PORT OR PLACE AND MAY CANCEL THE CHARTER PARTY OR REFUSE TO PROCEED ON THE VOYAGE ONLY IF SUCH NOMINATION IS NOT MADE WITHIN FORTY-EIGHT (48) HOURS AFTER THE REQUEST.
(F) IF IN COMPLIANCE WITH SUB CLAUSE (E) ABOVE ANYTHING IS DONE OR NOT DONE, SUCH SHALL NOT BE DEEMED A DEVIATION, BUT SHALL BE CONSIDERED DUE FULFILMENT OF THIS CHARTER PARTY.
(G) CHARTERERS SHALL INDEMNIFY OWNERS AGAINST ANY AND ALL CLAIMS BROUGHT BY THE OWNERS OF THE CARGO AND/OR THE HOLDERS OF BILLS OF LADING, WAYBILLS OR OTHER DOCUMENTS EVIDENCING CONTRACTS OF CARRIAGE AND/OR SUB-CHARTERERS AGAINST OWNERS BY REASON OF  OWNERS’ COMPLIANCE WITH SUCH ALTERNATIVE VOYAGE ORDERS OR DELIVERY OF THE CARGO IN ACCORDANCE WITH SUBCLAUSE (E) ABOVE.
(H) CHARTERERS SHALL PROCURE THAT THIS CLAUSE SHALL BE INCORPORATED INTO ALL SUB-CHARTERS AND BILLS OF LADING, WAYBILLS OR OTHER DOCUMENTS EVIDENCING CONTRACTS OF CARRIAGE ISSUED PURSUANT TO THIS CHARTER PARTY.
37. THE OWNER WARRANTS AND REPRESENTS THAT IT WILL NOT NOMINATE ANY VESSEL IN THE PERFORMANCE OF ITS OBLIGATIONS UNDER THIS CONTRACT IN VIOLATION OF US SANCTIONS AND/OR EUROPEAN UNION (EU) SANCTIONS AND/OR SWISS SANCTIONS AND/OR UK SANCTIONS AND/OR SANCTIONS IMPOSED BY ANY OTHER COUNTRY OR AUTHORITY (HEREINAFTER, "SANCTIONS") OR WHICH WOULD PUT CHARTERER IN BREACH, OR UNDER DESIGNATION RISK, OF ANY SANCTIONS.
FURTHERMORE, THE OWNERS ACKNOWLEDGE AND CONFIRM THAT THE LAST THREE VOYAGES HAVE NOT BEEN IN BREACH AND/OR CIRCUMVENTED OF ANY SANCTIONS UNDER ANY JURISDICTION AND THAT ANY PARTY(S) IN THESE VOYAGES WERE NOT SANCTIONED OR IN BREACH OF ANY SANCTIONS.
CHARTERERS CONFIRM NEITHER THEY NOR SHIPPER/RECEIVER ARE SUBJECT TO ANY SANCTION OF THE UN, US, EU OFAC OR ANY OTHER COUNTRY OR SIMILAR ENTITY.
WITHOUT LIMITING ITS RIGHTS UNDER THIS CONTRACT OR AT LAW, CHARTERER WILL HAVE THE
RIGHT TO REJECT
ANY NOMINATION WHICH,
(A) VIOLATES ANY SANCTIONS,
(B) PUTS CHARTERER IN BREACH, OR UNDER DESIGNATION RISK, OF ANY SANCTIONS, OR
(C) OTHERWISE INVOLVES A VESSEL THAT IS THE SUBJECT TO ANY SANCTIONS (INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, VESSELS THAT ARE THE SUBJECT OF SANCTIONS DUE TO OWNERSHIP, VOYAGE HISTORY OR COUNTRY OF REGISTRATION, OR THAT APPEAR ON ANY SANCTIONS LIST), OR COULD BECOME SUBJECT TO ANY SANCTION BY WAY OF HAVING BREACHED OR CIRCUMVENTED ANY SANCTIONS BY SERVING A REJECTION NOTICE ON THE OWNER DETAILING THE GROUNDS FOR THE REJECTION. WITHOUT LIMITING ITS RIGHTS UNDER THIS CONTRACT OR AT LAW, IF CHARTERER REJECTS A NOMINATION ON THESE GROUNDS IT SHALL BE ENTITLED, AT ITS SOLE DISCRETION
